# Member URL snapshot

Per-member contact + URL records for every current MP and peer,
keyed by MNIS member ID. Generated by:

```sh
parl members crawl --out third_party/data/members --delay-ms 80
```

## Files

- `<id>.json` — one file per member. Schema:
  ```jsonc
  {
    "id": 4514,
    "name": "Sir Keir Starmer",
    "nameListAs": "Starmer, Sir Keir",
    "party": "Labour",
    "partyAbbr": "Lab",
    "partyId": 15,
    "house": "Commons",                     // or "Lords"
    "constituency": "Holborn and St Pancras",
    "constituencyId": 4140,
    "membershipStart": "2015-05-07T00:00:00",
    "membershipEnd": null,
    "gender": "M",
    "thumbnailUrl": "https://members-api.parliament.uk/api/Members/4514/Thumbnail",
    "social":   [{ "type": "X (formerly Twitter)", "url": "https://twitter.com/keir_starmer" }],
    "websites": [{ "type": "Website", "url": "http://www.keirstarmer.com/" }],
    "emails":   ["keir.starmer.mp@parliament.uk", "keir.starmer.constituency@parliament.uk"],
    "phones":   ["020 7219 4426"],
    "offices":  [{ "type": "Parliamentary office", "line1": "House of Commons", "postcode": "SW1A 0AA", "...": "..." }],
    "fetchedAt": "2026-05-03T07:00:00.000Z"
  }
  ```
- `index.json` — manifest with a slim summary for every member
  (`{id, name, party, partyAbbr, house, constituency, urlCount}`),
  plus crawl metadata (`fetchedAt`, `houses`, `count`, error list).

## Coverage at time of snapshot

| Field | Count / 1426 |
|---|---|
| House of Commons | 650 |
| House of Lords | 776 |
| Has email | 1417 |
| Has website | 436 |
| X (formerly Twitter) | 532 |
| Facebook | 326 |
| Instagram | 152 |
| Bluesky | 46 |
| LinkedIn | 21 |
| YouTube | 17 |
| TikTok | 17 |
| Threads | 5 |

## Source

UK Parliament Members API — `https://members-api.parliament.uk/api/Members/{id}/Contact`.
Open Parliament Licence.

## Refreshing

The crawler is resumable; rerun the same command and it will skip
existing files. Pass `--refetch` to overwrite, `--include-historical`
to include former members.
